hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams identify and route high-risk wallet exposures by consolidating transaction monitoring, sanctions data, and provider alerts into one structured review process.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: High-risk wallet screens slow compliance workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to consolidate wallet risk signals from multiple providers into actionable cases. This fragmentation delays alert triage and weakens traceability between wallet risk, transactions, and final decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk outputs from multiple providers and links them to related transactions, customers, and cases so compliance teams can efficiently triage alerts with full audit evidence.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals, routes alerts into case workflows, supports compliance review and preserves evidence for transaction-linked risk decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet and transaction risk signals into structured cases, decisions and evidence so compliance teams can manage high-risk wallets with clear audit trails.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing high-risk wallet exposure with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment for defensible compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help identify and route high-risk wallet alerts
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet risk alerts connect to case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how wallet screening supports audit-ready evidence packages
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY manages provider outputs for wallet risk review
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for wallet risk screening?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet risk signals and transaction monitoring into a structured compliance workflow for VASPs, linking wallets, alerts, counterparties and cases for clearer risk management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle high-risk wallet alerts?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes high-risk wallet alerts into cases with linked transactions, customers and counterparties, enabling timely review, decision logging and regulatory rule application.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to maintain clear audit trails and support compliance review readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect multiple KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY aggregates outputs from multiple KYT and blockchain analytics providers into one operational layer for connected risk screening and workflow management.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing wallet screening tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above wallet screening providers and does not replace them, instead connecting their outputs into structured workflows and audit-ready reporting.
final_title: Connect wallet risk signals into reviewable cases
final_description: Review how SFTY aggregates high-risk wallet alerts, sanctions data and transaction signals into structured compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
